_meta.description: Industry taxonomy for classifying companies as product-company (positive), services/consulting (negative), or neutral.

product_company.description: Product companies — explicitly valued by JD. Score multiplier: 1.0
product_company.note: Smaller product companies = startup experience = positive JD signal

it_services.description: IT services / outsourcing companies — explicitly flagged in JD as a negative signal.
it_services.exception: If candidate ALSO has prior product-company experience, consulting background is penalized but not vetoed

neutral_or_unclear.description: Industries that require further context (company name, size) to classify.
neutral_or_unclear.note: These are not explicitly penalized, but are not preferred. Use company size and name as additional signals.

classification_logic.step_1: Check industry field against product_company.industries → 1.0 multiplier
classification_logic.step_2: Check industry field against it_services.industries → 0.5 multiplier
classification_logic.step_3: Check company name against it_services.known_negative_companies → 0.4 multiplier (stronger penalty)
classification_logic.step_5: Adjust by company_size: '1-10'/'11-50' product company → extra +0.1; '10001+' at IT Services → extra -0.1
classification_logic.product_company_indicator: If candidate has ANY role at a product company in career history, they get partial credit even if current role is at services firm
